issues.description: Main ability missing cost requirement: 'You may rest 2 of your DON!! cards' is not represented. Should have condition checking HasAttachedDon >= 2 or similar cost gate.
Rest action targets wrong scope. Should target opponent's Characters (cost ≤5), not own Characters. Action should be KO/negate effect on opponent's Character, not Rest own DON.

Action type is 'Rest' but effect text says 'Negate the effect'. Should remove Rest action and add proper negation (no direct negation action exists; this may require KO or special handling). Current DSL fundamentally misrepresents the ability.
Counter ability requires 'you have 10 or more cards in your trash' but condition is 'Always'. Should be TrashCount >= 10.
Main ability text says 'during this turn' which implies DuringYourTurn scope/duration, not covered by current DSL structure.
